visual: A small wooden ship sails across a bright ocean at sunrise, with a distant island barely visible on the horizon.
camera: wide cinematic establishing shot, slow forward push
dialogue: Narrator: Beyond the Red Sea, some maps are better left buried.
animation_method: background keyframe with slow camera movement

visual: Captain Aro stands on the ship mast with a playful fearless grin. His straw-colored scarf flutters in the sea wind.
animation_method: character keyframe with subtle scarf/wind motion

visual: Aro opens an old wooden chest. A glowing ancient map rises from inside, casting golden light on his face.
Navigator Mina quickly grabs the glowing map from Aro and studies it with a serious expression.
animation_method: character keyframe with subtle camera movement

visual: Aro leans closer to the glowing map with a greedy excited smile while Mina looks annoyed.
dialogue: Aro: It’s glowing. That means expensive. Mina: No. It means cursed.
animation_method: keyframe with small zoom and expression emphasis

visual: A dark rival ship appears through thick fog behind Aro and Mina's ship. Its black sails cut through the mist.
A cannon blast hits the water beside the ship. The deck shakes. Mina holds the map tightly while Aro laughs excitedly.
dialogue: Aro: Great. I was getting bored.
animation_method: keyframe with camera shake, water splash, impact effect

visual: Aro jumps from the mast toward the deck as ropes snap and rain begins to fall around him.
The glowing map unfolds by itself and points toward a dark forbidden island silhouette beyond the storm.
dialogue: Narrator: The map pointed to an island erased from every sea chart.
animation_method: keyframe with glow and storm movement

location: front of the ship facing the island
visual: Aro and Mina stand at the front of the ship facing the forbidden island. Aro grins while Mina looks worried.
